title: Board Members of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) in 2002
content:
The 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs lists the following individuals as Board Members:
- Patricia A. Sto. Tomas, Chairperson
- Rosalinda Dimapilis-Baldoz, Board Member
- Luzviminda L. Elbinias, Board Member
- Ezekiel T. Alunen, Board Member
- Vicente F. Aldanese, Board Member
- Gregorio S. Oca, Board Member

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Full Text.pdf
